heading: Change in name of part of Hawaii National Park
label: 391d Change in name of part of Hawaii National Park
text: Effective , the portion of the Hawaii National Park situated on the island of Hawaii, established and administered pursuant to sections 391, 393, and 394 of this title, as amended and supplemented, shall be known as the Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park.September 22, 1961
notes: Amendments2000— substituted “Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park” for “Hawaii Volcanoes National Park”.Pub. L. 106–510

Change of Name, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–510, § 3(a)(2)114 Stat. 2363Nov. 13, 2000“Any reference in any law (other than this Act [see Tables for classification]), regulation, document, record, map, or other paper of the United States to ‘Hawaii Volcanoes National Park’ shall be considered a reference to ‘Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park’.”
amendments: Amendments2000— substituted “Hawaiʻi Volcanoes National Park” for “Hawaii Volcanoes National Park”.Pub. L. 106–510

Change of Name, , , provided that:Pub.
